Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kathrin]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kathrin is someone Kai might alert if she consents to return.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kathrin is one of Valin's true children who passed his test.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Kathrin is a person who has made her own life and refuses to go near her old master without a duel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Kathrin could not make it to the camp due to trauma in her youth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Kathrin is a person used to cover defense points.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Kathrin is still alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Kathrin is supposed to have a Dragon's Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Kathrin has an advisor capable of long-distance communication.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Kathrin fought the Ornheim Incarnation's golems.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Kathrin disappeared after the battle in Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Kathrin is a Valinhall Traveler.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
